commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio exec -n yanxi-validation uccl-ep-diag -- bash -lc "TORCH_LIB=\$(python3 -c \"import torch,os;print(os.path.dirname(torch.__file__)+\\\"/lib\\\")\"); echo TORCH_LIB=\$TORCH_LIB; export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=\$TORCH_LIB:\$LD_LIBRARY_PATH; ls \$TORCH_LIB | head -10; echo ===TRY uccl.ep===; python3 -c \"import uccl.ep as ep; print(\\\"uccl.ep OK\\\", ep.__file__)\" 2>&1; echo ===TRY deep_ep===; python3 -c \"import deep_ep; print(\\\"deep_ep OK\\\", deep_ep.__file__)\" 2>&1; echo ===ls tests===; ls /opt/uccl/ep/tests/ 2>&1 | head -5; ls /opt/deepep/tests/ 2>&1 | head -5"'
